CREATE TABLE t1 (arr Array(UInt32)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple();
CREATE TABLE t2 (nested Array(Array(UInt8))) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple();
CREATE TABLE t3 (tuple_arr Array(Tuple(id UInt32, name String))) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple();
CREATE TABLE t4 (arr Array(Array(Array(UInt32)))) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple();
SELECT arr.size0, arr.size1, arr.size2 FROM t4;
CREATE TABLE t5 (a UInt32, b Array(String)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple();
CREATE TABLE t6 (x Array(UInt8)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple();
SELECT array(1, 2, NULL) AS arr, toTypeName(arr) FROM t6;
SELECT array(1, 'a') AS arr FROM t6;
CREATE TABLE t7 (outer_arr Array(Array(UInt32))) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple();
SELECT outer_arr.size0, outer_arr.size1 FROM t7 WHERE outer_arr.size0 > 1;
